name: ai-config-sync
description: AI Agent configuration sync system — private config repo + Claude Code / Codex integrations

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/core && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/scanner && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/state-manager && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/git-sync && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/drivers && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/recipe-engine && npm run build -w @ai-config-sync/cli
